name: Chocolate Macaroon Cake
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------COCONUT-MACAROON FILLING--------------------------
1. Reserve egg white.
2. In a small bowl, beat the egg white at high speed until soft peaks form.
3. Gradually add sugar; beat until stiff peaks form.
4. By hand, stir in coconut, flour, and vanilla; blend well. Set mixture aside.
Cake:
--------------------------------------------CHOCOLATE GLAZE------------------------------
2 cups confectioners' sugar
1 tablespoon butter
1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract
3 tablespoons milk
1/4 cup cocoa
Instructions for Cake:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all cake ingredients; blend at low speed until moistened.
2. Beat 3 minutes at medium speed.
3. Pour batter into greased and floured 12-cup Bundt pan.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of the coconut filling over the chocolate batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in pan for 10-15 minutes.
7. Turn cake onto a wire rack or serving platter to complete cooling.
8. Top with Chocolate Glaze.
Glaze:
1. In a small bowl, combine sugar, cocoa, and butter.
2. Add vanilla; stir gradually into milk to achieve desired consistency.
3. Stir until smooth. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
